title: solanum denticulatum var. gouakai
intro: Solanum denticulatum var. gouakai is a plant species, also known as the Gouakai or Native Geraldton Sandalwood, which is native to Western Australia. The medicinal properties of Solanum denticulatum var. gouakai include its antifungal and antibacterial properties, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting healthy skin, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Solanum denticulatum var. gouakai can be prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of a tincture, salve, or oil, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
